mapper.select: SELECT q.qna_no AS qnaNo, q.member_no AS memberNo, q.cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, q.title, q.content, q.answer, q.answer_member_no AS answerMemberNo, q.status, q.reg_date AS regDate, q.answer_date AS answerDate, c.cate_name AS cateName, m.name AS name FROM qna q JOIN cs_category c ON q.cs_cate_no = c.cs_cate_no JOIN member m ON q.member_no = m.member_no ORDER BY q.qna_no DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna(member_no, cs_cate_no, title, content, answer, answer_member_no, status, reg_date, answer_date) VALUES(#{memberNo}, #{csCateNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{answer}, #{answerMemberNo}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'WAIT'), NOW(), #{answerDate})
